ALL_JOURNAL_EXCEL_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/import/all_title_list.xlsx'
ALL_JOURNAL_CSV_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/all/all_title_list.csv'

OA_JOURNAL_EXCEL_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/import/oa_title.xlsx'
OA_JOURNAL_CSV_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/oa/oa_title.csv'

GOLD_OA_JOURNAL_EXCEL_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/import/gold_oa_title.xlsx'
GOLD_OA_JOURNAL_CSV_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/gold-oa/gold_oa_title.csv'

GOLD_OA_PRICELIST_EXCEL_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/import/gold_oa_price_list.xlsx'
GOLD_OA_PRICELIST_CSV_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/SAGE/gold-oa-pricelist/gold_oa_price_list.csv'

# All Journal configuration

useCols = 'A:J'
skiprow = 0
# nrow= 1059
nrow= 1057
sheet_name = '(2025PREM2025) (PREM2025) Premi'

df = pd.read_excel(
    ALL_JOURNAL_EXCEL_PATH,
    sheet_name=sheet_name,
    usecols=useCols,
    skiprows=skiprow,
    nrows=nrow            
)

df.to_csv(ALL_JOURNAL_CSV_PATH , index=False)

# OA Journal Configuration
useCols = 'A:G'
skiprow = 0
nrow= 1085
sheet_name = 'Sage Choice Pricing 2025'

df = pd.read_excel(
    OA_JOURNAL_EXCEL_PATH,
    sheet_name=sheet_name,
    usecols=useCols,
    skiprows=skiprow,
    nrows=nrow            
)

df.to_csv(OA_JOURNAL_CSV_PATH , index=False)

# Gold OA Journal Configuration
useCols = 'A:K'
skiprow = 0
nrow= 224
sheet_name = '(2025GOLDOA25) (GOLDOA25) GOLD '

df = pd.read_excel(
    GOLD_OA_JOURNAL_EXCEL_PATH,
    sheet_name=sheet_name,
    usecols=useCols,
    skiprows=skiprow,
    nrows=nrow            
)

df.to_csv(GOLD_OA_JOURNAL_CSV_PATH , index=False)

# Gold OA Journal Price List Configurtion
useCols = 'C:H'
skiprow = 0
nrow= 227
sheet_name = 'Gold OA Pricing List'

df = pd.read_excel(
    GOLD_OA_PRICELIST_EXCEL_PATH,
    sheet_name=sheet_name,
    usecols=useCols,
    skiprows=skiprow,
    nrows=nrow            
)

df.to_csv(GOLD_OA_PRICELIST_CSV_PATH , index=False)
